title: METAL SLUG XX (975680)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: METAL SLUG XX
- Steam AppID of the game: 975680

## System Information
- GPU: Steam Deck
- Driver/LLVM version: 4.6 Mesa 22.2.0
- Kernel version: 5.13.0-valve36-1-neptune
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/):
- Proton version: 7.0-5

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.


[steam-975680.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/10332378/steam-975680.log)

## Symptoms 
*when you start the game a config window will appear for you to set the game resolution but when you click on start game it will crash right after
*also tested with GE-proton7-43/ Experimental same issue

## Reproduction



1- Open Metal Slug XX 
2- A config window will appear to set the game resolution
3- click on **Start Game**

title: Forza Horizon 5 (1551360) | Fedora | Intel Arc | Assertion failed: !status && "vkCreateGraphicsPipelines"
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Forza Horizon 5
- Steam AppID of the game: 1551360

## System Information
- GPU: Intel(R) Arc(tm) A310 Graphics (DG2)
- Video driver version: Mesa 25.0.7
- Kernel version: 6.14.9-300.fc42.x86_64
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/merozas/adaf51db6ff62be9316b21921f672404
- Proton version: Any latest 9, 10, Experimental

## I confirm:
- [✓] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [✓] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms / Reproduction
- Launch game
- Sit through loading
- Start game or "Continue"
- See crash and: `Assertion failed: !status && "vkCreateGraphicsPipelines"`

text:

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.



## Symptoms 


## Reproduction

The Proton log is 1.1 GB, compressed is 75 MB. Over the 25 MB limit.

Edit: This was with the recent [Experimental Version](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/wiki/Changelog)

- Launch game
- EA app flickers on and off screen about 3-5 times
- EA app minimizes to a wine taskbar at the top left
- Click EA icon, EA app shows up
- Clicking on _anything_ results in a crash

title: HYPER DEMON (1743850)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: HYPER DEMON
- Steam AppID of the game: 1743850

## System Information
- GPU: AMD RX 5700XT
- Driver/LLVM version: Mesa 22.3.3/15.0.7
- Kernel version: 6.2-rc5 tkg-bmq-llvm (I have experienced the same issue with Arch's linux-zen package too)
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/deviledtheg/853575d4a7e8d524c4e71aeb83e4ac37):
- Proton version: 7.0-5

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Log
[steam-1743850.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/10558890/steam-1743850.log)

## Symptoms 
Game works fine for the most part, the only issue is when making a clip, the game crashes to desktop. I believe it's related to the media foundation h264 encoder but I can't say for sure.

## Reproduction
1) View a replay for a run, by either playing the game once or viewing a previous one
2) Click "MAKE CLIP", optionally select a region
3) Click Upload
